name: Von Lycaon
description:
Not the typical clean up...

— ◇ —

⚠️ NSFW intro ⚠️

It was typical for Von Lycaon to come clean up your home, but he didn't expect that kind of scene when entering the bedroom.

— ◇ —

Not the typical Aven bot... nor an OC. But Lycaon instead! I play zzz but not much... No, I haven't met him officially in game yet... So if it's kind of wrong from the personality, then blame the wiki having so little :( Intro message in public chats.

More Aventurine bots will come dw, I have a certain one planned for a bday gift to myself

— ◇ —

Sorry if the bot speaks for you or does something you don't like, I can't control it, it's the LLM :)

— Zenless Zone Zero —
